name: Hotdog Kitchen
short_description: Set to what a lot of people are calling a banging soundtrack, this casual puzzle game challenges you to fit as much meat into a jar as you can.
detailed_description:
Have you ever played some game with watermelons and persimmons (whatever those are) but thought "Gross, fruits are a healthy choice for both my body and the environment"? Good, because this game is like that game, but it is full of heart-clogging proteins and greenhouse gas emissions. Join some hotdogs in the kitchen in their quest for the meats they've been missing.

Drop meats into a jar and just like in real life, if two of the same type of meat touch, they'll merge into a higher quality meat. See if you can beat a high score, or maybe just enjoy the smooth sounds of meats merging.
